title: Tests and dogfood for the graph-template engine
description:
Cover the engine with tests and dogfood it.

Add unit, isolated temporary-repository integration, and property tests (the applied graph is acyclic and transitively reduced; gates are attached; re-apply is idempotent; the transform uses the pre-apply snapshot). Dogfood applying the plan template on a real container, and reseed the existing empty planning-node descriptions.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] [hard] TEST-01: Unit, temp-repo integration, and property tests pass and never touch the production store.
- [ ] [hard] TEST-02: The plan template is applied on a real container, producing the expected bracket.
- [ ] [hard] TEST-03: The existing empty planning-node descriptions are reseeded.
